privileged_info_summary: The packet_size_distribution_analysis task analyzes the 200722_tcp_anon.pcapng capture file, a real (non-synthetic) network traffic dataset from Wireshark's official sample captures on wiki.wireshark.org. The file is 12,800 bytes and contains 35 packets of mixed TCP protocols. The task computes packet size statistics using tshark (minimum, maximum, and average frame lengths) and categorizes packets into six size buckets (0-79, 80-159, 160-319, 320-639, 640-1279, 1280-2559 bytes), then identifies the dominant bucket with the highest packet count. Ground truth is computed during task setup at /var/lib/wireshark_ground_truth/ground_truth.json and the report is written to /home/ga/Documents/captures/packet_size_report.txt.
